title: U.S. NEW HOME SALES
subtitle:
Special profitability
on EUR/USD
text-1: New home sales is an economic indicator that measures the number of newly constructed homes with a committed sale during the month. The level of new home sales indicates housing market trends and, in turn — economic momentum.
text-2: Last month New home sales jumped more than 6 percent, hitting a 7-month high. Apparently, America's rising consumer confidence continues to propel the economy forward. Real estate analysts believe there’s plenty of room for continued growth in home ownership still, which means the figures for March are likely to be even higher.
text-3: The forecast volume of new home sales for March is 585,000 units. A higher than expected reading should then be taken as bullish for the US dollar.
note-text: You can find the latest market overviews and forecasts on the IQ Option blog.
asterisk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid on April 25 from 13:00 to 15:00 GMT.
